name: Fairy on a Mushroom
subject: fairy
prompt: a little fairy with delicate pointed wings sitting on top of a big round spotted mushroom, holding a tiny flower, a short petal skirt, surrounded by blades of grass and a couple of small toadstools

name: Flying Fairy with Wand
subject: fairy
prompt: a cheerful fairy flying with outstretched wings, waving a star-tipped wand that trails a swirl of sparkles, a flowing dress and curly hair streaming back, tiny stars floating all around

name: Garden Fairy with Flowers
subject: fairy
prompt: a sweet garden fairy kneeling among tall flowers, holding a small watering can, leafy wings and a petal skirt, with two butterflies fluttering nearby and rounded flower blossoms framing her

name: Fairy on a Flower
subject: fairy
prompt: a tiny fairy perched inside the open petals of a big blooming flower as if it were a chair, knees tucked up and chin resting on her hands, rounded wings folded behind her, a curving stem with a leaf below

name: Fairy and a Butterfly
subject: fairy
prompt: a gentle fairy standing on tiptoe reaching up to a large butterfly that has landed on her fingertip, the butterfly's wings spread wide with simple patterned shapes, a few smaller flutter-shapes and floating dots around them

name: Sleeping Fairy
subject: fairy
prompt: a peaceful fairy curled up asleep inside a flower-petal hammock slung between two stems, eyes gently closed with a soft smile, wings tucked in, a crescent moon and a scatter of stars in the night above her

name: Tooth Fairy
subject: fairy
prompt: a friendly tooth fairy hovering with little wings, holding a small drawstring pouch in one hand and a shiny tooth in the other, a star-tipped wand tucked in her belt, a sprinkle of sparkles and a tiny pillow below

name: Fairy House in a Tree
subject: fairy
prompt: a cozy little fairy house built into the base of an old tree trunk, a round arched door, two small round windows, a curled mushroom-cap roof, a tiny stone path and a few flowers and toadstools at the doorstep

name: Water Fairy by the Pond
subject: fairy
prompt: a graceful water fairy sitting on a broad lily pad at the edge of a calm pond, trailing one hand in the water to make ripples, slender dragonfly-like wings, cattails and a curious frog on a nearby leaf

name: Fairy Friends Dancing
subject: fairy
prompt: three little fairies holding hands and dancing together in a ring on the grass, flowing skirts twirling and wings spread, happy laughing faces, a circle of small mushrooms and flowers around their feet

name: Winter Fairy
subject: fairy
prompt: a delicate winter fairy floating gently with frost-patterned wings, wearing a cozy petal dress with a fluffy collar, holding a large six-sided snowflake, soft snowflakes drifting down around her

name: Baby Fairy
subject: fairy
prompt: an adorable chubby-cheeked baby fairy sitting in the cup of a tulip flower, tiny round wings, a big happy grin, reaching both little arms up toward a fluttering ladybug, with simple grass and a leaf nearby
